relations.note: Chart headline sits atop the chart container treatment.
Hero % figures are the emphasis points that receive warm accent colors.

quotes: Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.
Clean, easy to scan, consistent with the system. Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.

rules.intent: Keep charts consistent, clean, and easy to scan across the system.
rules.rule_text: Charts and infographics use a clean, scannable container: uniform rounded corners (radius.chart.uniform = 12px), a Light Blue panel (chart.container.fill = #E6F0F9) with a Brand Blue rounded header bar (chart.header.fill = #00529b).

effect.reserved_for: emphasis on key figures/data points only
effect.subject: Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a)

quotes: Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.
**Color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.** Placebo/comparator: neutral gray.

rules.intent: Reserve warm accents for data emphasis and keep placebo neutral.
rules.rule_text: Chart color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) are dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) are reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only. Placebo/comparator series use a neutral gray (chart.color.placebo).

quotes: Bars and chart icons: **rounded, approachable** shapes (rounded bar tops).
Bars and chart icons: **rounded, approachable** shapes (rounded bar tops).

rules.intent: Convey an approachable, friendly data style.
rules.rule_text: Chart bars and chart icons use rounded, approachable shapes with rounded bar tops (chart.bars.shape = rounded).

quotes: Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), **ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.
Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), **ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.

rules.intent: Give chart headlines a consistent, branded treatment.
rules.rule_text: Chart headlines set in Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), ALL CAPS, Brand Blue (chart.headline.color = #00529b), with a thin Gold rule beneath (chart.headline.rule_color = #ffc60a).

quotes: Statistical callouts: **large and bold** (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a **lighter weight beneath**.
Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.

rules.intent: Emphasize the key statistic while de-emphasizing supporting copy and footnotes.
rules.rule_text: Statistical callouts are large and bold — the % figure is the hero — with supporting copy in a lighter weight beneath. Footnotes are noticeably smaller and clearly separated from the primary data.
